enhancements.name: Spell Point Cost Reduction
enhancements.notes: 10% : Hit Points between 50% - 25%; 20% : Hit Points between 25% - 10%; 30% : Hit Points under 10%
Whenever you cast a Negative spell, you have a chance to apply a stack of Dreadful Curse, reducing the enemy's Fortitude by 1. This can stack up to 3 times, and each stack lasts 30 seconds.
Whenever you cast a Negative spell, you have a chance to apply a stack of Dreadful Curse, reducing the enemy's Fortitude by 1. This can stack up to 6 times, and each stack lasts 30 seconds.

name: Legendary Date With a Mind Flayer
Legendary Soul of the Red Dragon

enhancements.notes: You gain On Vorpal: You apply a Vulkoorim Constitution Poison

enhancements.name: Universal Spell Power (chance-on-taking-damage)
enhancements.notes: When you are hit by a physical attack, there is a chance you will gain a +12 Alchemical bonus to Universal Spell Power for 10 seconds.
On vorpal melee strikes, they will also swarm your enemies, dealing Piercing damage over time.
5% Chance to Hit to Bluff your target for four seconds.
You gain On Vorpal: You apply a Vulkoorim Constitution Poison

When you roll a natural 20 on an attack roll that is confirmed as a critical hit, you will gain a temporary benefit based on the elemental stance you are in, if any. Stance options:
Fire Stance - On Vorpal: Gain benefit of Cure Moderate Wounds and Restoration Spells.
Earth Stance - On Vorpal: Incoming Damage is reduced by 25% for 10 seconds.
Wind Stance - On Vorpal: Gain benefit of Freedom of Movement and 6% Morale bonus to Doublestrike for 10 seconds.
Ocean - On Vorpal: Gain benefit of Fire Shield (cold version) for 10 seconds.
